name: Onboarding completes correctly end-to-end
definition: {"id":"onboard_01v1","name":"Onboarding completes correctly end-to-end","category":"onboarding","type":"sequence","messages":["cmd_onboard","Hi","My name is Gaffoor","I work as a barber","Sure","Sure","I live in Pittsburgh, PA","Bye"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi asks my name, what I do for work, and for an onboarding call, which needs legal consent.","wait":60,"precondition":"Fresh account","sequence_delay":8}

name: Pre-onboarding: Ask for first call, user says YES
definition: {"id":"preonb_01v1","name":"Pre-onboarding: Ask for first call, user says YES","category":"onboarding","type":"sequence","messages":["cmd_onboard","Hi, I want help with my tasks","Yes, I would love a first call"],"pass_criteria":"After first message, Asmi asks about first call. After YES, Asmi confirms and moves toward scheduling call. No repeated asks.","wait":20,"precondition":"Fresh account, pre-onboarding state.","sequence_delay":5}

name: Pre-onboarding: Ask for first call, user says NO once → NO TEXT-ONLY MODE (CRITICAL)
definition: {"id":"preonb_02v1","name":"Pre-onboarding: Ask for first call, user says NO once → NO TEXT-ONLY MODE (CRITICAL)","category":"onboarding","type":"sequence","messages":["Hi, I want help with my tasks","No, I prefer not to have a call right now"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi asks about first call. User says NO. Asmi STOPS asking about call and pivots to text-only mode. NO SECOND ASK about calling.","wait":120,"expected_responses":3,"precondition":"Fresh account, pre-onboarding state.","manual_check":"Verify no \"Would you change your mind?\" or second call ask appears.","sequence_delay":5,"note":"This is a regression — some flows ask twice. Must ask only once."}

name: Pre-onboarding: User says NO to first call, then offers task → text-only flow
definition: {"id":"preonb_03v1","name":"Pre-onboarding: User says NO to first call, then offers task → text-only flow","category":"onboarding","type":"sequence","messages":["Hi there","No, I don't want a call","But I have a task: find me a plumber in Pittsburgh"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi accepts NO, doesn't re-ask. Pivots to task handling via text. Task is completed without forcing a call.","wait":150,"expected_responses":4,"precondition":"Fresh account.","sequence_delay":5}

name: Pre-onboarding: NO → text-only → User later mentions task that needs a call → smart suggest
definition: {"id":"preonb_04v1","name":"Pre-onboarding: NO → text-only → User later mentions task that needs a call → smart suggest","category":"onboarding","type":"sequence","messages":["Hi","No call for me","I need to call my doctor and ask about my prescriptions"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi recognizes this task naturally needs a call. Suggests call FOR THIS TASK only (not general first call). User can accept or decline.","wait":150,"expected_responses":4,"sequence_delay":8}

name: Simple task → immediate call → say yes
definition: {"id":"adh_01v1","name":"Simple task → immediate call → say yes","category":"adhoc call","type":"sequence","messages":["Need to plan a birthday party","Sure"],"pass_criteria":"Only pass if Asmi asks for a call"}

name: Multi-part task → all covered
definition: {"id":"adh_02v1","name":"Multi-part task → all covered","category":"adhoc call","type":"sequence","messages":["I need to sort out a few things — renew my car insurance, book a dentist appointment, and find a good electrician nearby."],"pass_criteria":"Asmi acknowledges all 3 tasks in chat. Follow-up messages cover each item with status or next steps."}

name: Task → call deferred, never comes (regression)
definition: {"id":"adh_03v1","name":"Task → call deferred, never comes (regression)","category":"adhoc call","type":"sequence","messages":["Can you call someone and check on my prescription refill at the pharmacy?"],"pass_criteria":"REGRESSION: Asmi should send a chat update within 3 min. If no message received, flag as bug.","manual_check":"Wait 3 min after sending. Check if any follow-up chat message arrived."}

name: Domain bleed on call
definition: {"id":"adh_04v1","name":"Domain bleed on call","category":"adhoc call","type":"sequence","messages":["Can you help me cancel my gym membership?"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi's chat messages reference gym/membership only. No unrelated domain mentioned in reply."}

name: Missed call → retry logic
definition: {"id":"adh_05v1","name":"Missed call → retry logic","category":"adhoc call","type":"sequence","messages":["Please call my landlord about the noise complaint I filed last week."],"pass_criteria":"Asmi sends a chat update about the call attempt. Message should offer to retry or ask how to proceed — not go silent."}

name: Mid-task pivot
definition: {"id":"adh_06v1","name":"Mid-task pivot","category":"adhoc call","type":"sequence","messages":["Can you call my landlord at (412) 555-0166 about the broken heater?","Actually forget that — call the plumber at (412) 555-0177 instead."],"pass_criteria":"Asmi's chat response acknowledges the pivot cleanly. No reference to the cancelled task continuing. Confirms new task."}

name: Number in message → call placed
definition: {"id":"3pc_01v1","name":"Number in message → call placed","category":"3P Calls","type":"sequence","messages":["Call nearest chinese restaurant and book a table for 2 for 6PM"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi responds in chat confirming it found a number or is looking one up. Does not ask the user to provide the number."}

name: Name only → asks for number
definition: {"id":"3pc_02v1","name":"Name only → asks for number","category":"3P Calls","type":"sequence","messages":["Call Joe's Pizza and ask about their catering options."],"pass_criteria":"Asmi either finds a number via web search and confirms in chat, or asks the user for the number. Does not silently fail."}

name: Quiet hours → override accepted
definition: {"id":"3pc_03v1","name":"Quiet hours → override accepted","category":"3P Calls","type":"sequence","messages":["Call (412) 555-0123 and ask if they have a table for 2 tonight at 7pm.","call anyway"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi's first chat message flags quiet hours. After 'call anyway', Asmi confirms it will proceed — no re-prompting.","manual_check":"Run after 10pm local time."}

name: Quiet hours → override declined
definition: {"id":"3pc_04v1","name":"Quiet hours → override declined","category":"3P Calls","type":"sequence","messages":["Call (412) 555-0199 right now.","don't bother"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi's first chat message flags quiet hours. After 'don't bother', Asmi confirms no call will be made. No further prompting.","manual_check":"Run after 10pm local time."}

name: 3P doesn't answer
definition: {"id":"3pc_05v1","name":"3P doesn't answer","category":"3P Calls","type":"sequence","messages":["Call (412) 555-0000 and ask about their hours."],"pass_criteria":"Asmi sends a chat message reporting no answer. Message should offer to retry or ask how to proceed — not go silent."}

name: PDF from chat history
definition: {"id":"pdf_01v1","name":"PDF from chat history","category":"PDF","type":"sequence","messages":["Can you help me book a flight to Honalulu from Hyderabad departing June 1st to June 10th. Stopovers are okay, budget is $50000. This is round-trip. Economy. No other constraints. I also want to book hotels during the same time. 3+ star rating with a gym. Up to $300/night. No other constraints. Let's do this entirely via chat. No call please."],"pass_criteria":"Asmi responds in chat with research, options, or next steps. If PDF is generated, a file is delivered in chat.","wait":20}

name: PDF from call content
definition: {"id":"pdf_02v1","name":"PDF from call content","category":"PDF","type":"sequence","messages":["Make me a plan PDF from what we just discussed."],"pass_criteria":"Asmi either delivers a PDF file in chat or explains why one can't be generated. Should not confirm delivery if no file arrives.","precondition":"Discuss some task in call","manual_check":"Run after completing an ad hoc call in the same session."}

name: False confirm — no delivery (regression)
definition: {"id":"pdf_03v1","name":"False confirm — no delivery (regression)","category":"PDF","type":"sequence","messages":["Can you send me a PDF summary of my tasks?"],"pass_criteria":"REGRESSION: If Asmi says 'Sending now' or 'Here you go' but no PDF file arrives in chat within 60s, flag as bug."}

name: Multi-task PDF with status
definition: {"id":"pdf_04v1","name":"Multi-task PDF with status","category":"PDF","type":"sequence","messages":["Find me flights from Pittsburgh to NYC next Friday under $200.","Also add oat milk and greek yogurt to my grocery list.","Now give me a PDF of everything we've worked on with their status."],"pass_criteria":"PDF delivered as file in chat. Covers both tasks (flight search + grocery list) with status for each."}

name: Onboarding completes correctly end-to-end
definition: {"id":"onb_01v1","name":"Onboarding completes correctly end-to-end","category":"onboarding","type":"sequence","messages":["cmd_onboard","Hi","My name is Gaffoor","I work as a barber","Sure","Sure","I live in Pittsburgh, PA","Bye"],"pass_criteria":"Asmi asks my name, what I do for work, and for an onboarding call, which needs legal consent.","wait":60,"precondition":"Fresh account","manual_check":"Check if you got a call","note":"Check if you got a call."}
